creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179758
patch

The port now fails with openssl-devel or libressl-devel. The attached patch fixes this, while also setting PLIST_FILES, removing pkg-plist, setting LICENSE and changing maintainer to me (now unmaintained).

Build fine with Poudriere on 10.3-RELEASE (base openssl, openssl-devel, libressl-devel).
